---
title: "Session 09 teaching notes: Python 6"
session_id: session-09
event_id: null
---

## Session 9 — For and while loops

See [for_demo.py](../materials/for_demo.py)

Loop: explain with sum/product \sum_i^n

p. 110/111: nr 3-4, 6-7 homework

while exercises:
nr 1: homework
nr 2-4: in-session
nr 5-6: homework
-> remind: nr 6 same task as in Excel

## Exercises

| Page(s) | Exercise      | Summary                                                                                                                                    | Files                                                                                                                | In-class / take-home |
| ------: | ------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | -------------------- |
| 110–111 | `for` loops   | Repeat messages, calculate an average, identify multiples, generate Fibonacci numbers and random frequencies, and print a letter triangle. | `Message.py`<br>`Average.py`<br>`Tens.py`<br>`MultipleSum.py`<br>`Fibonacci.py`<br>`Frequencies.py`<br>`Triangle.py` |                      |
| 113–114 | `while` loops | Build a shopping list, implement two guessing games, extend the dice game, and generate a loan-repayment history.                          | `ShoppingList.py`<br>`Guess1.py`<br>`Guess2.py`<br>`Dicegame2.py`<br>`Loan.py`                                       |                      |


<!--
    ## Session overview

    - **Focus:** Python
    - **Session title:** Python 1
    - **Coverage target:** Until **Accessing data**

    ## Before class

    - [ ] Review the session slides/materials.
    - [ ] Prepare files, datasets, and examples.
    - [ ] Note any announcements or reminders.

    ## Timing record

    Use this table while preparing or after teaching to record the actual timing.

    | Planned time | Actual time | Topic/activity | Notes for next time |
    |---|---|---|---|
    | 0--10 min |  | Setup / recap |  |
    | 10--30 min |  | Main input |  |
    | 30--60 min |  | Guided practice |  |
    | 60--80 min |  | Independent practice / questions |  |
    | 80--90 min |  | Wrap-up |  |

    ## Notes during class

    - TBD

    ## Follow-up

    - [ ] Update examples or instructions.
    - [ ] Record common questions.
    - [ ] Add reminders for the next session.
-->
